America's Premier Government Contract Advisory Systems

We put small business in the room.

A fully operational government contracting division — installed inside your company. Compliance, certifications, bid intelligence, and complete financing. Zero out-of-pocket.

Check If I Qualify See Our Method
$0B+ Federal Contracts Annually
0% Mandated Set-Aside
$0B+ Awarded for GCAS Clients
0+ Years of Experience
"When a client tells me they sent their daughter to college because they won a government contract — that means more to me than any fee."
Jason Webb · Founder & Managing Advisor · 30+ Years

Explore the Program

Everything you need.
Nothing you don't.

Each pillar of the GCAS Network is its own discipline — and its own page. Click to go deep.

The Defining Misconception

Compliance wins.
Not the low bid.

A contracting officer never sees your price until your paperwork passes. We build the compliance infrastructure that gets you in the room.

Read the method

The GCAS Professional Network

200+ experts.
One turnkey solution.

Technical writers, pricing specialists, SMEs, procurement consultants, compliance auditors, and HR architects — all working on your single bid.

Meet the network

Safety · Compliance · Culture

The government's highest priority
is yours.

OSHA, HAZMAT, First Aid, drug-free workplace, employee handbook, photo documentation. Every safeguard a contracting officer expects — installed and showcased.

See what we install

Small Business Administration

Designations create leverage.

8(a), HUBZone, WOSB, SDVOSB, SDB. Each designation unlocks a separate competitive lane. We file every one you qualify for.

Explore SBA designations

Become a GCAS Consultant

50+ hours of training.
A career in procurement.

Trained on every contract vehicle — IDIQ, MATOC, NAVFAC, IFB, RFP, RFQ, BPA, GWAC. Access to non-public portals. Capabilities-statement authoring. Become the reason a small business wins.

Apply to train

Client Stories

Real people.
Real transformations.

Not just contract wins — kids through college, debts paid off, second-generation businesses funded. The reason we keep doing this.

Read their stories

Specialty Tracks

Deeper still.

Specialties

10 specialty divisions.

Roofing, HVAC, pest control, grounds, accounting, tree, construction, painting, pressure washing, security.

View specialties

Contract Vehicles

IDIQ. MATOC. SubNet.

Unlock the hidden federal subcontracting market — the largest pool of awards small businesses never see.

Tour the vehicles

Consulting

For active contractors.

Bid strategy, pricing intelligence, compliance uplift, and contract performance advisory for businesses already in the market.

See consulting

Mentorship

1:1 with Jason Webb.

For owners building a durable, multi-generational government contracting operation. By application only.

Apply for mentorship

Get Started

Performance-based fees.
Zero out-of-pocket.

Qualifying clients are financed through the award cycle. All costs rebated on first award. Your net financial risk to enter the government market is zero.

Check if I qualify

Begin

Your government contract
starts with one conversation.

30 minutes. No obligation. We'll review your business and tell you honestly whether GCAS is the right fit.

Check If I Qualify Schedule Discovery Call

A fully operational government contracting division — installed inside your company. Compliance, certifications, bid intelligence, and complete financing. Zero out-of-pocket.

Check If I Qualify See Our Method
$0B+ Federal Contracts Annually
0% Mandated Set-Aside
$0B+ Awarded for GCAS Clients
0+ Years of Experience
"When a client tells me they sent their daughter to college because they won a government contract — that means more to me than any fee."
Jason Webb · Founder & Managing Advisor · 30+ Years

Explore the Program

Everything you need.
Nothing you don't.

Each pillar of the GCAS Network is its own discipline — and its own page. Click to go deep.

The Defining Misconception

Compliance wins.
Not the low bid.

A contracting officer never sees your price until your paperwork passes. We build the compliance infrastructure that gets you in the room.

Read the method

The GCAS Professional Network

200+ experts.
One turnkey solution.

Technical writers, pricing specialists, SMEs, procurement consultants, compliance auditors, and HR architects — all working on your single bid.

Meet the network

Safety · Compliance · Culture

The government's highest priority
is yours.

OSHA, HAZMAT, First Aid, drug-free workplace, employee handbook, photo documentation. Every safeguard a contracting officer expects — installed and showcased.

See what we install

Small Business Administration

Designations create leverage.

8(a), HUBZone, WOSB, SDVOSB, SDB. Each designation unlocks a separate competitive lane. We file every one you qualify for.

Explore SBA designations

Become a GCAS Consultant

50+ hours of training.
A career in procurement.

Trained on every contract vehicle — IDIQ, MATOC, NAVFAC, IFB, RFP, RFQ, BPA, GWAC. Access to non-public portals. Capabilities-statement authoring. Become the reason a small business wins.

Apply to train

Client Stories

Real people.
Real transformations.

Not just contract wins — kids through college, debts paid off, second-generation businesses funded. The reason we keep doing this.

Read their stories

Specialty Tracks

Deeper still.

Specialties

10 specialty divisions.

Roofing, HVAC, pest control, grounds, accounting, tree, construction, painting, pressure washing, security.

View specialties

Contract Vehicles

IDIQ. MATOC. SubNet.

Unlock the hidden federal subcontracting market — the largest pool of awards small businesses never see.

Tour the vehicles

Consulting

For active contractors.

Bid strategy, pricing intelligence, compliance uplift, and contract performance advisory for businesses already in the market.

See consulting

Mentorship

1:1 with Jason Webb.

For owners building a durable, multi-generational government contracting operation. By application only.

Apply for mentorship

Get Started

Performance-based fees.
Zero out-of-pocket.

Qualifying clients are financed through the award cycle. All costs rebated on first award. Your net financial risk to enter the government market is zero.

Check if I qualify

Begin

Your government contract
starts with one conversation.

30 minutes. No obligation. We'll review your business and tell you honestly whether GCAS is the right fit.

Each pillar of the GCAS Network is its own discipline — and its own page. Click to go deep.

The Defining Misconception

Compliance wins.
Not the low bid.

A contracting officer never sees your price until your paperwork passes. We build the compliance infrastructure that gets you in the room.

Read the method

The GCAS Professional Network

200+ experts.
One turnkey solution.

Technical writers, pricing specialists, SMEs, procurement consultants, compliance auditors, and HR architects — all working on your single bid.

Meet the network

Safety · Compliance · Culture

The government's highest priority
is yours.

OSHA, HAZMAT, First Aid, drug-free workplace, employee handbook, photo documentation. Every safeguard a contracting officer expects — installed and showcased.

See what we install

Small Business Administration

Designations create leverage.

8(a), HUBZone, WOSB, SDVOSB, SDB. Each designation unlocks a separate competitive lane. We file every one you qualify for.

Explore SBA designations

Become a GCAS Consultant

50+ hours of training.
A career in procurement.

Trained on every contract vehicle — IDIQ, MATOC, NAVFAC, IFB, RFP, RFQ, BPA, GWAC. Access to non-public portals. Capabilities-statement authoring. Become the reason a small business wins.

Apply to train

Real people.
Real transformations.

Not just contract wins — kids through college, debts paid off, second-generation businesses funded. The reason we keep doing this.

50+ hours of training.
A career in procurement.

Trained on every contract vehicle — IDIQ, MATOC, NAVFAC, IFB, RFP, RFQ, BPA, GWAC. Access to non-public portals. Capabilities-statement authoring. Become the reason a small business wins.

Apply to train

Real people.
Real transformations.

Not just contract wins — kids through college, debts paid off, second-generation businesses funded. The reason we keep doing this.

America's Premier Government Contract Advisory Systems

We put small business in the room.

A fully operational government contracting division — installed inside your company. Compliance, certifications, bid intelligence, and complete financing. Zero out-of-pocket.

Check If I Qualify See Our Method
$0B+ Federal Contracts Annually
0% Mandated Set-Aside
$0B+ Awarded for GCAS Clients
0+ Years of Experience
"When a client tells me they sent their daughter to college because they won a government contract — that means more to me than any fee."
Jason Webb · Founder & Managing Advisor · 30+ Years

Explore the Program

Everything you need.
Nothing you don't.

Each pillar of the GCAS Network is its own discipline — and its own page. Click to go deep.

The Defining Misconception

Compliance wins.
Not the low bid.

A contracting officer never sees your price until your paperwork passes. We build the compliance infrastructure that gets you in the room.

Read the method

The GCAS Professional Network

200+ experts.
One turnkey solution.

Technical writers, pricing specialists, SMEs, procurement consultants, compliance auditors, and HR architects — all working on your single bid.

Meet the network

Safety · Compliance · Culture

The government's highest priority
is yours.

OSHA, HAZMAT, First Aid, drug-free workplace, employee handbook, photo documentation. Every safeguard a contracting officer expects — installed and showcased.

See what we install

Small Business Administration

Designations create leverage.

8(a), HUBZone, WOSB, SDVOSB, SDB. Each designation unlocks a separate competitive lane. We file every one you qualify for.

Explore SBA designations

Become a GCAS Consultant

50+ hours of training.
A career in procurement.

Trained on every contract vehicle — IDIQ, MATOC, NAVFAC, IFB, RFP, RFQ, BPA, GWAC. Access to non-public portals. Capabilities-statement authoring. Become the reason a small business wins.

Apply to train

Client Stories

Real people.
Real transformations.

Not just contract wins — kids through college, debts paid off, second-generation businesses funded. The reason we keep doing this.

Read their stories

Specialty Tracks

Deeper still.

Specialties

10 specialty divisions.

Roofing, HVAC, pest control, grounds, accounting, tree, construction, painting, pressure washing, security.

View specialties

Contract Vehicles

IDIQ. MATOC. SubNet.

Unlock the hidden federal subcontracting market — the largest pool of awards small businesses never see.

Tour the vehicles

Consulting

For active contractors.

Bid strategy, pricing intelligence, compliance uplift, and contract performance advisory for businesses already in the market.

See consulting

Mentorship

1:1 with Jason Webb.

For owners building a durable, multi-generational government contracting operation. By application only.

Apply for mentorship

Get Started

Performance-based fees.
Zero out-of-pocket.

Qualifying clients are financed through the award cycle. All costs rebated on first award. Your net financial risk to enter the government market is zero.

America's Premier Government Contract Advisory Systems

We put small business in the room.

A fully operational government contracting division — installed inside your company. Compliance, certifications, bid intelligence, and complete financing. Zero out-of-pocket.

Check If I Qualify See Our Method
$0B+ Federal Contracts Annually
0% Mandated Set-Aside
$0B+ Awarded for GCAS Clients
0+ Years of Experience
"When a client tells me they sent their daughter to college because they won a government contract — that means more to me than any fee."
Jason Webb · Founder & Managing Advisor · 30+ Years

Explore the Program

Everything you need.
Nothing you don't.

Each pillar of the GCAS Network is its own discipline — and its own page. Click to go deep.

The Defining Misconception

Compliance wins.
Not the low bid.

A contracting officer never sees your price until your paperwork passes. We build the compliance infrastructure that gets you in the room.

Read the method

The GCAS Professional Network

200+ experts.
One turnkey solution.

Technical writers, pricing specialists, SMEs, procurement consultants, compliance auditors, and HR architects — all working on your single bid.

Meet the network

Safety · Compliance · Culture

The government's highest priority
is yours.

OSHA, HAZMAT, First Aid, drug-free workplace, employee handbook, photo documentation. Every safeguard a contracting officer expects — installed and showcased.

See what we install

Small Business Administration

Designations create leverage.

8(a), HUBZone, WOSB, SDVOSB, SDB. Each designation unlocks a separate competitive lane. We file every one you qualify for.

Explore SBA designations

Become a GCAS Consultant

50+ hours of training.
A career in procurement.

Trained on every contract vehicle — IDIQ, MATOC, NAVFAC, IFB, RFP, RFQ, BPA, GWAC. Access to non-public portals. Capabilities-statement authoring. Become the reason a small business wins.

Apply to train

Client Stories

Real people.
Real transformations.

Not just contract wins — kids through college, debts paid off, second-generation businesses funded. The reason we keep doing this.

Read their stories

Specialty Tracks

Deeper still.

Specialties

10 specialty divisions.

Roofing, HVAC, pest control, grounds, accounting, tree, construction, painting, pressure washing, security.

View specialties

Contract Vehicles

IDIQ. MATOC. SubNet.

Unlock the hidden federal subcontracting market — the largest pool of awards small businesses never see.

Tour the vehicles

Consulting

For active contractors.

Bid strategy, pricing intelligence, compliance uplift, and contract performance advisory for businesses already in the market.

See consulting

Mentorship

1:1 with Jason Webb.

For owners building a durable, multi-generational government contracting operation. By application only.

Apply for mentorship

Get Started

Performance-based fees.
Zero out-of-pocket.

Qualifying clients are financed through the award cycle. All costs rebated on first award. Your net financial risk to enter the government market is zero.

Check if I qualify

Begin

Your government contract
starts with one conversation.

30 minutes. No obligation. We'll review your business and tell you honestly whether GCAS is the right fit.

Check If I Qualify Schedule Discovery Call

A career in procurement.

Trained on every contract vehicle — IDIQ, MATOC, NAVFAC, IFB, RFP, RFQ, BPA, GWAC. Access to non-public portals. Capabilities-statement authoring. Become the reason a small business wins.

Apply to train

Client Stories

Real people.
Real transformations.

Not just contract wins — kids through college, debts paid off, second-generation businesses funded. The reason we keep doing this.

Read their stories

Deeper still.

Specialties

10 specialty divisions.

Roofing, HVAC, pest control, grounds, accounting, tree, construction, painting, pressure washing, security.

View specialties

IDIQ. MATOC. SubNet.

Unlock the hidden federal subcontracting market — the largest pool of awards small businesses never see.

200+ experts.

Safety · Compliance · Culture

is yours.

OSHA, HAZMAT, First Aid, drug-free workplace, employee handbook, photo documentation. Every safeguard a contracting officer expects — installed and showcased.

Small Business Administration

Designations create leverage.

8(a), HUBZone, WOSB, SDVOSB, SDB. Each designation unlocks a separate competitive lane. We file every one you qualify for.

50+ hours of training.
A career in procurement.

Trained on every contract vehicle — IDIQ, MATOC, NAVFAC, IFB, RFP, RFQ, BPA, GWAC. Access to non-public portals. Capabilities-statement authoring. Become the reason a small business wins.

The GCAS Professional Network

200+ experts.

Technical writers, pricing specialists, SMEs, procurement consultants, compliance auditors, and HR architects — all working on your single bid.

Safety · Compliance · Culture

The government's highest priority
is yours.

OSHA, HAZMAT, First Aid, drug-free workplace, employee handbook, photo documentation. Every safeguard a contracting officer expects — installed and showcased.

Small Business Administration

Designations create leverage.

8(a), HUBZone, WOSB, SDVOSB, SDB. Each designation unlocks a separate competitive lane. We file every one you qualify for.

Become a GCAS Consultant

50+ hours of training.
A career in procurement.

Trained on every contract vehicle — IDIQ, MATOC, NAVFAC, IFB, RFP, RFQ, BPA, GWAC. Access to non-public portals. Capabilities-statement authoring. Become the reason a small business wins.

America's Premier Government Contract Advisory Systems

We put small business in the room.

A fully operational government contracting division — installed inside your company. Compliance, certifications, bid intelligence, and complete financing. Zero out-of-pocket.

Check If I Qualify See Our Method
$0B+ Federal Contracts Annually
0% Mandated Set-Aside
$0B+ Awarded for GCAS Clients
0+ Years of Experience
"When a client tells me they sent their daughter to college because they won a government contract — that means more to me than any fee."
Jason Webb · Founder & Managing Advisor · 30+ Years

Explore the Program

Everything you need.
Nothing you don't.

Each pillar of the GCAS Network is its own discipline — and its own page. Click to go deep.

The Defining Misconception

Compliance wins.
Not the low bid.

A contracting officer never sees your price until your paperwork passes. We build the compliance infrastructure that gets you in the room.

Read the method

The GCAS Professional Network

200+ experts.
One turnkey solution.

Technical writers, pricing specialists, SMEs, procurement consultants, compliance auditors, and HR architects — all working on your single bid.

Meet the network

Safety · Compliance · Culture

The government's highest priority
is yours.

OSHA, HAZMAT, First Aid, drug-free workplace, employee handbook, photo documentation. Every safeguard a contracting officer expects — installed and showcased.

See what we install

Small Business Administration

Designations create leverage.

8(a), HUBZone, WOSB, SDVOSB, SDB. Each designation unlocks a separate competitive lane. We file every one you qualify for.

Explore SBA designations

Become a GCAS Consultant

50+ hours of training.
A career in procurement.

Trained on every contract vehicle — IDIQ, MATOC, NAVFAC, IFB, RFP, RFQ, BPA, GWAC. Access to non-public portals. Capabilities-statement authoring. Become the reason a small business wins.

Apply to train

Client Stories

Real people.
Real transformations.

Not just contract wins — kids through college, debts paid off, second-generation businesses funded. The reason we keep doing this.

Read their stories

Specialty Tracks

Deeper still.

Specialties

10 specialty divisions.

Roofing, HVAC, pest control, grounds, accounting, tree, construction, painting, pressure washing, security.

View specialties

Contract Vehicles

IDIQ. MATOC. SubNet.

Unlock the hidden federal subcontracting market — the largest pool of awards small businesses never see.

Tour the vehicles

Consulting

For active contractors.

Bid strategy, pricing intelligence, compliance uplift, and contract performance advisory for businesses already in the market.

See consulting

Mentorship

1:1 with Jason Webb.

For owners building a durable, multi-generational government contracting operation. By application only.

Apply for mentorship

Get Started

Performance-based fees.
Zero out-of-pocket.

Qualifying clients are financed through the award cycle. All costs rebated on first award. Your net financial risk to enter the government market is zero.

Check if I qualify

Begin

Your government contract
starts with one conversation.

30 minutes. No obligation. We'll review your business and tell you honestly whether GCAS is the right fit.

The Defining Misconception

Compliance wins.
Not the low bid.

A contracting officer never sees your price until your paperwork passes. We build the compliance infrastructure that gets you in the room.

The GCAS Professional Network

200+ experts.
One turnkey solution.

Technical writers, pricing specialists, SMEs, procurement consultants, compliance auditors, and HR architects — all working on your single bid.

Meet the network

Safety · Compliance · Culture

The government's highest priority
is yours.

OSHA, HAZMAT, First Aid, drug-free workplace, employee handbook, photo documentation. Every safeguard a contracting officer expects — installed and showcased.

See what we install

Small Business Administration

Designations create leverage.

8(a), HUBZone, WOSB, SDVOSB, SDB. Each designation unlocks a separate competitive lane. We file every one you qualify for.

Become a GCAS Consultant

50+ hours of training.
A career in procurement.

Trained on every contract vehicle — IDIQ, MATOC, NAVFAC, IFB, RFP, RFQ, BPA, GWAC. Access to non-public portals. Capabilities-statement authoring. Become the reason a small business wins.

Apply to train

America's Premier Government Contract Advisory Systems

We put small business in the room.

A fully operational government contracting division — installed inside your company. Compliance, certifications, bid intelligence, and complete financing. Zero out-of-pocket.

Check If I Qualify See Our Method
$0B+ Federal Contracts Annually
0% Mandated Set-Aside
$0B+ Awarded for GCAS Clients
0+ Years of Experience
"When a client tells me they sent their daughter to college because they won a government contract — that means more to me than any fee."
Jason Webb · Founder & Managing Advisor · 30+ Years

Explore the Program

Everything you need.
Nothing you don't.

Each pillar of the GCAS Network is its own discipline — and its own page. Click to go deep.

The Defining Misconception

Compliance wins.
Not the low bid.

A contracting officer never sees your price until your paperwork passes. We build the compliance infrastructure that gets you in the room.

Read the method

The GCAS Professional Network

200+ experts.
One turnkey solution.

Technical writers, pricing specialists, SMEs, procurement consultants, compliance auditors, and HR architects — all working on your single bid.

Meet the network

Safety · Compliance · Culture

The government's highest priority
is yours.

OSHA, HAZMAT, First Aid, drug-free workplace, employee handbook, photo documentation. Every safeguard a contracting officer expects — installed and showcased.

See what we install

Small Business Administration

Designations create leverage.

8(a), HUBZone, WOSB, SDVOSB, SDB. Each designation unlocks a separate competitive lane. We file every one you qualify for.

Explore SBA designations

Become a GCAS Consultant

50+ hours of training.
A career in procurement.

Trained on every contract vehicle — IDIQ, MATOC, NAVFAC, IFB, RFP, RFQ, BPA, GWAC. Access to non-public portals. Capabilities-statement authoring. Become the reason a small business wins.

Apply to train

Client Stories

Real people.
Real transformations.

Not just contract wins — kids through college, debts paid off, second-generation businesses funded. The reason we keep doing this.

Read their stories

Specialty Tracks

Deeper still.

Specialties

10 specialty divisions.

Roofing, HVAC, pest control, grounds, accounting, tree, construction, painting, pressure washing, security.

View specialties

Contract Vehicles

IDIQ. MATOC. SubNet.

Unlock the hidden federal subcontracting market — the largest pool of awards small businesses never see.

Tour the vehicles

Consulting

For active contractors.

Bid strategy, pricing intelligence, compliance uplift, and contract performance advisory for businesses already in the market.

See consulting

Mentorship

1:1 with Jason Webb.

For owners building a durable, multi-generational government contracting operation. By application only.

Apply for mentorship

Get Started

Performance-based fees.
Zero out-of-pocket.

Qualifying clients are financed through the award cycle. All costs rebated on first award. Your net financial risk to enter the government market is zero.

Check if I qualify

Begin

Your government contract
starts with one conversation.

30 minutes. No obligation. We'll review your business and tell you honestly whether GCAS is the right fit.

200+ experts.

Safety · Compliance · Culture

is yours.

Small Business Administration

Designations create leverage.

8(a), HUBZone, WOSB, SDVOSB, SDB. Each designation unlocks a separate competitive lane. We file every one you qualify for.

50+ hours of training.
A career in procurement.

Trained on every contract vehicle — IDIQ, MATOC, NAVFAC, IFB, RFP, RFQ, BPA, GWAC. Access to non-public portals. Capabilities-statement authoring. Become the reason a small business wins.

Compliance wins.
Not the low bid.

200+ experts.

Technical writers, pricing specialists, SMEs, procurement consultants, compliance auditors, and HR architects — all working on your single bid.

is yours.

Designations create leverage.

8(a), HUBZone, WOSB, SDVOSB, SDB. Each designation unlocks a separate competitive lane. We file every one you qualify for.

50+ hours of training.
A career in procurement.

© 2026 GCAS Network · Government Contract Advisory Systems · All rights reserved.

Our Engagement Model

Services & Fees

Strategic procurement support built on a performance-based model. We win when you win.

Exclusive Territory Representation

GCAS LLC supports contractors in strategically pursuing and winning government contracts at the federal, state, and local levels. For each defined territory, we align with one qualified contractor, providing structured and exclusive representation on relevant solicitations.

Our role is to strengthen your competitive positioning, ensure compliance alignment, and manage a disciplined, strategic approach throughout the procurement process.

Getting Procurement-Ready

If your company moves forward as a GCAS client, our first step is to ensure you are fully procurement-ready. This includes securing and/or optimizing key registrations such as UEI and CAGE codes, SBA designations, and developing core materials like your Capability Statement and internal documentation.

We will monitor opportunities daily within your assigned NAICS codes across your territory of operation. For each relevant opportunity, you will receive a one-page executive summary for review.

Strategic Bid Support

If you choose to pursue a bid, we will provide the full solicitation package along with pricing intelligence to ensure your submission aligns with market expectations set by the issuing agency.

On every bid you pursue, we will work closely with you, applying the GCAS method to ensure your submission is both compliant and highly competitive.

Fee Structure

Success Fee

1.5% of Gross Contract Value

Paid only upon award. When you win, we win.

Retainer

$2,000

Covers initial setup and strategic positioning, including:

  • UEI & CAGE registration
  • SBA set-aside compliance alignment
  • Development of a professional Capability Statement
  • Full on-boarding into our bid monitoring system

Monthly Service Fee

$500

Begins in month two and covers ongoing monitoring, opportunity sourcing, and exclusive representation.

Fee Credit Structure

To align incentives, both the retainer and monthly service fees are credited toward the success fee upon contract award.

For example: If you are awarded a $1,000,000 contract, the success fee would be $15,000 (1.5%). If $5,000 has already been paid (retainer + monthly fees), your net success payment would be $10,000.

Ongoing monthly fees will continue to be credited toward future success fees.

We offer financing.

Access flexible payment options to get started. Your success is our priority.

Start here →
